entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop being evaluated for resistance to Heliothis armigera.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop being evaluated for resistance to Heliothis armigera.

entities.name: HELIOTHIS ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect that infests pigeon pea and chickpea.

entities.name: FIELD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist pest attack under field conditions.

entities.name: GRADING METHOD BASED ON PEST DAMAGE
entities.description: A suggested system for rating test materials based on the area of pest damage to determine susceptibility.

entities.name: RELATIVE SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which test materials are prone to pest damage relative to other entries.

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The occurrence and intensity of pest attack by Heliothis armigera.

entities.name: SEASONAL AND YEARLY VARIATION
entities.description: The fluctuations in pest infestation levels across different seasons and years.
